DESCRIPTION:
Update the Metalwork Legend (abbreviation) from a Source CSV file

USAGE:
    Wolf.Metalwork.Tool.dll legend <wolfwinPath> <sourcePath> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <wolfwinPath>    WolfWin Path containing Metalwork Files to Update
    <sourcePath>     Path to Source CSV File                          

OPTIONS:
                     DEFAULT                                              
    -h, --help                      Prints help information               
    -v, --version                   Prints version information            
    -t, --type       merronbrook    Type of the Source CSV File           
    -d, --dryrun                    Test the Import without updating Files
